creator: ntarmos@ceid.upatras.gr
text:
FWIW this bug has been fixed upstream in v1.9.0, released 2008-01-01.
Upstream is now in v1.10, including some more bugfixes, so this will all
be fixed when the port is updated. I already use the version in svn so
I'm ok to close this PR. I didn't find any other open (update) PRs for
this port, so I'll probably put together the patch to update it to v1.10
and send-pr it in the next few days, unless the maintainer gets there
before me... :)

\n\n
